'''Rith Murisson''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Krnay]]. She received [[Umgullian blob massage therapy]] on [[Umgul/Legends|Umgul]] while there. Unfortunately, some of the [[Umgullian blob|blob's]] secretions left disfiguring marks on her back.

{{Char-stub}}
